{{Infobox group
| name = Titans
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Titans]] are an order of [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Seventy-One Words of Fortification]] is a reinforcement technique favored by lower-level [[Titans]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|One-star [[Titans]] would be troubled defending against [[Markuth]]'s attacks.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
